case_title: GOOD EARTH ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA EL CID HOTEL VS WELLS FARGO BANK, LTD. SERVICING AGENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOOD EARTH ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA EL CID HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, LTD.  SERVICING AGENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOOD EARTH ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA EL CID HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, LTD.
